glosses.zh-Hans: 比; 引导从句（常省略）

translations.en: I think it’s going to rain.
translations.nl: Ik denk dat het gaat regenen.
translations.hi: मुझे लगता है कि बारिश होने वाली है.
translations.nb: Jeg tror det kommer til å regne.
translations.sv: Jag tror att det kommer att regna.
translations.da: Jeg tror, det kommer til at regne.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular), taking a complement clause introduced by que.
Complementizer; elided form of que before a vowel/h.
Impersonal/dummy subject pronoun used with weather/existential expressions.
Semi-auxiliary forming near future with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; impersonal meteorological verb.

sentences.target: Tu sais qu’on ferme à huit heures.
sentences.reading: /ty sɛ kɔ̃ fɛʁm a ɥit œʁ/

translations.fr: Tu sais qu’on ferme à huit heures.
translations.ipa: /ty sɛ kɔ̃ fɛʁm a ɥit œʁ/
translations.en: You know we close at eight o’clock.
translations.es: Sabes que cerramos a las ocho.
translations.de: Du weißt, dass wir um acht schließen.
translations.ko: 너 우리 여덟 시에 문 닫는 거 알지.
translations.ru: Ты знаешь, что мы закрываемся в восемь.
translations.pt: Você sabe que fechamos às oito.
translations.vi: Bạn biết chúng tôi đóng cửa lúc tám giờ.
translations.ar: أنت تعرف أننا نغلق في الثامنة.
translations.nl: Je weet dat we om acht uur sluiten.
translations.uk: Ти знаєш, що ми зачиняємось о восьмій.
translations.hi: तुम जानते हो कि हम आठ बजे बंद करते हैं.
translations.nb: Du vet at vi stenger klokka åtte.
translations.id: Kamu tahu kami tutup jam delapan.
translations.sv: Du vet att vi stänger klockan åtta.
translations.ro: Știi că închidem la ora opt.
translations.da: Du ved, at vi lukker klokken otte.
translations.ja: 八時に閉店するって知ってるよね。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative (2nd person singular), introducing a complement clause.
Complementizer; elided form of que before a vowel/h.
Indefinite personal pronoun (generic ‘we/they/one’).
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular) with subject on.
Preposition introducing a time complement.
Cardinal numeral indicating time.
Temporal noun, plural, complement to the preposition à.

sentences.target: On se retrouve parce qu’il y a du monde.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv paʁs kil ja dy mɔ̃d/

translations.fr: On se retrouve parce qu’il y a du monde.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv paʁs kil ja dy mɔ̃d/
translations.en: We’re meeting because there are a lot of people.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns, weil viele Leute da sind.
translations.it: Ci vediamo perché c’è molta gente.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们见面是因为人太多了。
translations.yue: 我哋見面係因為人好多。
translations.ru: Мы встречаемся, потому что здесь много людей.
translations.pt: A gente se encontra porque tem muita gente.
translations.he: אנחנו נפגשים כי יש הרבה אנשים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi gặp nhau vì có nhiều người.
translations.ar: نلتقي لأن هناك الكثير من الناس.
translations.nl: We ontmoeten elkaar потому что er veel mensen zijn.
translations.uk: Ми зустрічаємося, бо тут багато людей.
translations.hi: हम मिल रहे हैं क्योंकि यहाँ बहुत लोग हैं.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się, bo jest dużo ludzi.
translations.nb: Vi møtes fordi det er mange mennesker.
translations.id: Kami bertemu karena ada banyak orang.
translations.sv: Vi ses eftersom det är mycket folk.
translations.ro: Ne întâlnim pentru că sunt mulți oameni.
translations.cs: Scházíme se, protože je tu hodně lidí.
translations.da: Vi mødes, fordi der er mange mennesker.
translations.fi: Tapaamme, koska täällä on paljon ihmisiä.
translations.ja: 人が多いから会うんだ。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun (generic ‘we’).
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun; part of the pronominal verb se retrouver.
Main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular with on); pronominal usage with se.
First element of the complex causal conjunction parce que (‘because’).
Second element of parce que; complementizer ‘que’ elided before a vowel/h.
Impersonal/dummy subject in the existential construction il y a.
Clitic locative pronoun meaning ‘there’; fixed in the expression il y a.
Main verb (3rd person singular) in the existential expression il y a (‘there is/are’).
Partitive article (contraction of de + le) introducing an indefinite quantity.
Noun meaning ‘people’/‘crowd’ in this idiom; complement of il y a.

sentences.target: Je veux qu’elle me rappelle ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vø kɛl mə ʁapɛl sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je veux qu’elle me rappelle ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vø kɛl mə ʁapɛl sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I want her to call me back tonight.
translations.es: Quiero que me vuelva a llamar esta noche.
translations.de: Ich will, dass sie mich heute Abend zurückruft.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에 그녀가 다시 전화해 줬으면 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我希望她今晚给我回电话。
translations.ru: Я хочу, чтобы она перезвонила мне сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Quero que ela me ligue de novo hoje à noite.
translations.he: אני רוצה שהיא תתקשר אליי שוב הערב.
translations.tr: Onun bu akşam beni geri aramasını istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn cô ấy gọi lại cho tôi tối nay.
translations.ar: أريد أن تعاود الاتصال بي الليلة.
translations.nl: Ik wil dat ze me vanavond terugbelt.
translations.uk: Я хочу, щоб вона передзвонила мені сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hu: Azt akarom, hogy ma este visszahívjon.
translations.hi: मैं चाहता हूँ कि वह मुझे आज रात वापस फोन करे.
translations.pl: Chcę, żeby oddzwoniła do mnie dziś wieczorem.
translations.el: Θέλω να μου τηλεφωνήσει ξανά απόψε.
translations.nb: Jeg vil at hun skal ringe meg tilbake i kveld.
translations.id: Aku ingin dia meneleponku lagi malam ini.
translations.sv: Jag vill att hon ringer tillbaka till mig ikväll.
translations.ro: Vreau să mă sune înapoi diseară.
translations.cs: Chci, aby mi dnes večer zavolala zpět.
translations.da: Jeg vil have, at hun ringer tilbage til mig i aften.
translations.fi: Haluan, että hän soittaa minulle takaisin tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 今夜彼女に電話をかけ直してほしい。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative (1st person singular) expressing desire.
Complementizer introducing the content clause required by vouloir; elided before a vowel/h.
Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine, subject of rappelle.
Clitic object pronoun, 1st person singular, preceding the verb.
Verb (present subjunctive, 3rd person singular) triggered by vouloir que; pronominal object me.
Demonstrative determiner modifying soir (‘this/that’).
Temporal noun; here a time adjunct (tonight/this evening).

You know we close at eight o’clock.
We’re meeting because there are a lot of people.

Tôi muốn cô ấy gọi lại cho tôi tối nay.

Du vet att vi stänger klockan åtta.
